faqHits.question: Is spray foam insulation worth the extra cost?
faqHits.answerPreview: Spray foam provides the highest R-value per inch and also acts as an air barrier. Closed-cell foam is best for moisture-prone areas, while blown-in is often the most cost-effective

faqHits.question: How much insulation do I need?
faqHits.answerPreview: The DOE recommends R-38 to R-60 for attics in most climate zones. An energy audit can determine the exact R-value target for your home in Burnsville, MN.
